name: Braze, Inc.
summary: Braze, Inc. is a leading customer engagement platform that empowers brands to build direct, meaningful relationships with customers. Founded in 2011, Braze offers cross-channel marketing automation, data activation, segmentation, orchestration, and personalization capabilities. As of January 2026, the platform served 2,609 customers and enabled interactions with 8.0 billion monthly active users via apps, websites, and digital interfaces, leveraging AI and machine learning through products like BrazeAI Decisioning Studio and BrazeAI Agent Console.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
